2605.29889.title: Internal Representation, Not Clinical Knowledge: Where Apparent LLM Triage Failures Originate
2605.29889.paper_summary: Patient-voiced clinical-triage benchmarks report high under-triage rates for consumer LLMs for constrained multiple-choice output, yet the same cases score differently with free-text. We ask whether output format changes the model's \emph{clinical representation} or only the mapping from a preserved representation to an answer. Using sparse-autoencoder (SAE) features in Gemma 3 4B/12B IT and Qwen3-8B, we find the same medical features fire on the shared clinical narrative under both formats but go {silent} at the multiple-choice decision token in all the cases at every model. Three independent methods (natural-language autoencoder verbalization, decision-token logit attribution, and top-feature characterization) agree that scaffold and format features, but not medical features, drive the decision logits. Behaviorally, the multiple-choice penalty inverts under both structured and natural-language input, option-order shuffle rules out positional bias, and the gap is dominated by off-by-one decision (the model picks an adjacent acuity letter to the gold answer) rather than knowledge failure. Thus, the failure originates in the output format and not in the clinical representation.
2605.29889.paper_summary_zh: 病人聲音的臨床分流基準報告顯示，消費者 LLM 在受限的多選輸出中存在高比例的低分流率，但在自由文本中相同的案例得分卻不同。我們詢問輸出格式是否改變了模型的 \emph{臨床表徵}，還是僅僅改變了從保留的表徵到答案的映射。使用 Gemma 3 4B/12B IT 和 Qwen3-8B 中的稀疏自編碼器 (SAE) 特徵，我們發現相同的醫療特徵在兩種格式下的共享臨床敘事中都會被激活，但在所有模型的多選決策標記中卻保持 {靜默}。三種獨立的方法（自然語言自編碼器口頭化、決策標記邏輯歸因和頂部特徵特徵化）一致認為，支架和格式特徵，而不是醫療特徵，驅動了決策邏輯。行為上，多選懲罰在結構化和自然語言輸入下都會反轉，選項順序隨機打亂排除了位置偏見，而這一差距主要由錯誤一個的決策主導（模型選擇與金標答案相鄰的敏感度字母），而不是知識失敗。因此，失敗源於輸出格式，而不是臨床表徵。
2605.29889.author: David Fraile Navarro et.al.
2605.29889.authors: David Fraile Navarro, Berardino Como, Jialei Sheng, Soundariya Ananthan, Shlomo Berkovsky
